title: Component Watch
trigger: weekly or after gap analysis produces new candidates
description: Monitor external components, tools, and ecosystem venues for new versions, security patches, capability improvements, or opportunity windows. Report findings as improvement-proposal candidates without installing or acting. Priority targets: Clanker v5 (security audit in progress — revisit launch-rail.decision when shipped), Fractally community directory (list ZAO when live), Optimism Atlas Retro Funding (submit when next round opens).

watch_targets.check: new release tag v5.x or changelog entry mentioning B20/droid mechanics
watch_targets.on_detect: open improvement-proposal to revisit launch-rail.decision for v5 split mechanics
watch_targets.last_checked_result: NOT triggered — latest is clanker-sdk v4.2.18 (2026-07-08). No v5, no B20/droid mechanics. clanker-devco/clanker repo has no public releases; watch SDK repo instead.

watch_targets.check: community directory or DAO listing feature appears
watch_targets.on_detect: surface to Zaal to submit ZAO listing (only active fractal DAO on Optimism)
watch_targets.last_checked_result: NOT triggered — site has educational content and blog only. No DAO directory or listing feature found.

watch_targets.check: new Season 9+ Retro Funding round open for applications (Season 7 and Season 8 Onchain Builders both closed July 2025)
watch_targets.on_detect: surface to Zaal with reference to docs/zol-bankr-risk-model-v1.md and draft new application based on doc 1209 template
watch_targets.last_checked_result: NOT triggered — S7 Onchain Builders closed July 31 2025; S8 Onchain Builders closed July 30 2025. No Season 9 round announced as of 2026-07-17. Watch gov.optimism.io for S9 announcement.

watch_targets.check: new API endpoints or developer documentation published at zabalgamez.com (submissions, events, music catalog, artist profiles) that justify expanding the api.read.external allowlist beyond the current 'https://zabalgamez.com/' prefix
watch_targets.on_detect: open improvement-proposal to add specific new endpoint prefixes to the api.read.external ALLOWED_PREFIXES list in src/handlers/index.js
watch_targets.last_checked_result: NOT triggered — zabalgamez.com is accessible; api.read.external already allows the full 'https://zabalgamez.com/' prefix. No new API documentation found. Current coverage is sufficient.
